name: rubygems-integration
title: rubygems-integration
summary: integration of Debian Ruby packages with Rubygems
description:
integration of Debian Ruby packages with Rubygems
rubygems-integration makes Debian Ruby packages recognizable by Rubygems.
Debian Ruby packages may be used to satisfy Rubygems dependencies both with
plain Rubygems and with Bundler. This also allows one to use Debian Ruby
packages to satisfy dependencies in Rails 3 applications.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use rubygems-integration because integration of Debian Ruby packages with Rubygems.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use rubygems-integration as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair rubygems-integration with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `rubygems-integration --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
